summary: Completed frontend testing of CambridgeTestResults.js page. All required features are working correctly: Listening/Reading results with expandable details showing Your Answer, Correct Answer, and Explanation; Reading results with Locate in Passage, Explanation, and Skill Tip sections; Writing evaluation with detailed criteria scores (Task Achievement, Coherence, Lexical, Grammar) and feedback sections (Strengths, Areas to Improve, Vocabulary Notes, Grammar Notes); Overall band score card displays correctly with all 4 skills.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

critical_code_review_comments: The CambridgeTestResults.js page is well-implemented with proper UI components matching the Results.js reference
All required feedback sections are present: Locate in Passage (yellow), Explanation (blue), Skill Tip (purple)
Writing evaluation correctly shows 4 criteria scores with detailed feedback
Minor accessibility improvement: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components to fix console warnings
seed_data_creation: Created test user cambridgetest@test.com for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CambridgeTestResults.js page has been fully tested. All features working: 1) Listening results with expandable details showing Your Answer, Correct Answer, Explanation 2) Reading results with Locate in Passage, Explanation, Skill Tip sections 3) Writing evaluation with criteria scores and detailed feedback 4) Overall band score card with all 4 skills. Test user: cambridgetest@test.com / TestPassword123!

listening_results.details: Expandable section shows Your Answer, Correct Answer, and Explanation for incorrect answers

reading_results.details: Shows Locate in Passage (yellow), Explanation (blue), and Skill Tip (purple) sections for each question

writing_evaluation.details: Evaluate Writing button works, shows Task Achievement, Coherence & Cohesion, Lexical Resource, Grammar scores with Teacher's Feedback, Strengths, Areas to Improve, Vocabulary Notes, Grammar Notes

overall_band_score.details: Displays correctly with all 4 skills (Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking)
